calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Martin Hoffman, Esq. appeared for plaintif American Express Centurion Bank.
No appearance by defendant Kenley Raney.
Default was entered against defendant on August 27, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 4, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 14, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, and against the Defaulted Defendant Kenley Raney as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,745.67.
Prejudgment Interest - $702.97.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $434.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $27,883.14.

Judgement was submitted to and signed by the Court.
